name: jstack-loop
description: Top-level JStack command for bounded loops and durable multi-phase programs.

interface.shortDescription: Verified goal loops and multi-phase programs
interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex workflow that selects one bounded loop or a project-derived Program -> Phase DAG and composes native Goal mode with explicitly approved JStack single-lead, specialist-team, or full-team execution. Capability routing is bound into the durable contract, and multi-agent checkpoints require a current signed handoff. Git-bound contracts, scoped autonomy, convergence breakers, and current evidence remain mandatory before completion.
defaultPrompt: Complete this goal through a verified bounded loop or project-derived multi-phase JStack program.
